movie.overview: After the death of her beloved grandmother, eight-year-old Nelly meets a strangely familiar girl her own age in the woods. Instantly forming a connection with this mysterious new friend, Nelly embarks on a fantastical journey of discovery which helps her come to terms with this newfound loss.
movie.tagline: Experience a fairytale of wonder and innocence.
movie.title: Petite Maman

results.name: Celine Sciamma on how the idea for Petite Maman came to her in a dream
Céline Sciamma on Petite Maman at NYFF59
